# Inline and block HTML

This paragraph has a hard<br>break created with a `<br>` tag, and some
<b>bold via a b tag</b> plus <i>italic via an i tag</i> whose inner text must
survive even though the tags are stripped.

<div class="note">
This is a block-level div. The div tag must be stripped, but this sentence
should still appear in the output.
</div>

Final paragraph after the block HTML.
